📉 Waterfall📉 Sentiment Waterfall · Period-over-Period Trend
📖 What is a Sentiment Waterfall?
A Sentiment Waterfall shows how a key metric — negative rate, NSS, or volume — moves across consecutive periods. Each bar represents the change from the prior period: red bars mean the metric worsened, green bars mean it improved. This makes it easy to spot the exact weeks or months when sentiment shifted — and correlate those shifts with real-world events like product launches, price changes, or incidents.
How to read it
Red bar — metric deteriorated vs prior period
Green bar — metric improved vs prior period
Yellow anchor — baseline / running total
Orange line — alert threshold (40% neg rate)
Metric options
Neg Rate % — % of all mentions that are negative. Best for spotting crisis onset.
NSS — Net Sentiment Score (Pos−Neg)÷Total×100. Best overall health indicator.
Volume — Raw mention count. Useful when combined with Neg Rate to assess scale of issues.

Market

Category
NSS — Net Sentiment Score
Formula: (Positive − Negative) ÷ Total × 100
Range: −100 to +100

✅ >+50 Excellent · +20 to +50 Good
⚠ 0 to +20 Fair · 🔴 <0 Critical

Based on 19,932 total mentions.
NSS Score
-41
(Pos−Neg)÷Total×100
Critical
* For methodology please check at the bottom of the dashboard
NPS — Net Promoter Score
Formula: (Positive − Negative) ÷ (Positive + Negative) × 100
Excludes Passives (Neutral) from denominator

✅ >+50 Excellent · 0–50 Good · 🔴 <0 Critical

Different from NSS: amplifies damage from detractors vs promoter gain. Pos: 237 · Neg: 8,449
NPS
-95
(Pos−Neg)÷(Pos+Neg)×100
Critical
* For methodology please check at the bottom of the dashboard

Priority Actions Required
🚨
VP Brand & CX Crisis Escalation: NFL at 56.5% Negative
NFL has exceeded the crisis threshold with 56.5% negative sentiment across 565 mentions. Immediate executive attention required.
Recommended Actions: (1) Activate regional crisis response protocol within 24 hours. (2) Brief VP & relevant department heads. (3) Deploy rapid-response social team. (4) Identify and isolate top 3 complaint drivers for immediate resolution.
📈 Business Impact: Unchecked negative sentiment in NFL risks brand erosion, subscriber churn, and reputational damage in a key market.
📊 KPI to Track: Reduce NFL negative sentiment from 56.5% to below 40% within 14 days
NSS SignalRegional CXCrisis ResponseNFL
CRITICAL
🔧
Head of Product Others: 99% Negative Rate — Requires Sprint Priority
The Others category has 1,226 negative mentions. Primary complaint sub-categories: .
Recommended Actions: (1) Raise a P1 ticket to the Product Engineering team for root-cause investigation. (2) Draft customer-facing acknowledgement statement via CX. (3) Set up a weekly review cadence until negative rate drops below 30%. (4) Evaluate whether a temporary workaround or communication can reduce immediate frustration.
📈 Business Impact: Resolving Others issues could reduce overall negative sentiment by an estimated 40pp across affected markets.
📊 KPI to Track: Reduce Others negative mentions by 35% within the next 30 days
Product QualityCXOthers
HIGH
📣
VP Marketing Critically Low Positive Signal: 1.2% Positive Sentiment
Organic positive feedback is at 1.2% — well below healthy benchmark of 15–20%. Brand advocacy and word-of-mouth momentum are minimal.
Recommended Actions: (1) Launch a structured positive engagement campaign across key platforms. (2) Activate ambassador and superfan programs in highest-potential markets. (3) Brief content team to amplify positive fan moments. (4) Consider targeted promotions or value-adds to generate goodwill.
📈 Business Impact: Increasing positive sentiment to 12%+ would improve brand health index, improve organic reach, and reduce customer acquisition cost through referral.
📊 KPI to Track: Reach ≥12% positive sentiment rate within 30 days
Brand AdvocacyMarketingPositive Momentum
MEDIUM
✅
Head of Regional Replicate NATIONAL LEAGUE's Success Across Underperforming Markets
NATIONAL LEAGUE leads all markets with 2.9% positive sentiment. This market's approach should be codified and scaled.
Recommended Actions: (1) Conduct qualitative review of NATIONAL LEAGUE strategy — content mix, response times, CX touchpoints, and local market tactics. (2) Build a playbook and share with regional leads in underperforming markets. (3) Schedule cross-market knowledge-sharing workshop within 4 weeks.
📈 Business Impact: If other markets achieve 50% of NATIONAL LEAGUE's positive rate, overall brand health index improves significantly and reduces escalation volume.
📊 KPI to Track: Lift bottom 2 markets to within 10pp of NATIONAL LEAGUE's positive rate in 60 days

⚡ ORM Strategic Recommendations
Based on real customer verbatim · Powered by Claude AI · Click any card to expand
⚡ Data-driven analysis (AI offline)
Product Engineering 🔧 Platform & Technical 🚨 CRITICAL ▼
Fix "Payment And Billing" — Top Customer Pain Point
❝
"Ich verstehe nicht was hier los ist, aber ich werde definitiv fordern das Geld zurÃ¼ck zu bekommen."
Real Customer Voice
▼ Click To Expand Full Analysis
🔍 Why Customers Are Raising This
"Payment and Billing" accounts for 824 negative mentions, making it the single largest driver of customer dissatisfaction. Customers are repeatedly encountering this issue across markets, suggesting a systemic failure in the product or service rather than isolated incidents. The high volume indicates this has not been resolved through standard support channels.
📢 What Customers Are Saying
Customers are publicly voicing frustration with "Payment and Billing" on social and review platforms. The recurring nature of complaints suggests customers feel unheard and are escalating to public channels after exhausting direct support. A typical customer says: "Ich verstehe nicht was hier los ist, aber ich werde definitiv fordern das Geld zurÃ¼ck zu bekommen."
✅ Actions to Prevent Recurrence
1 Raise a P1 engineering ticket for "Payment and Billing" — assign a dedicated fix team within 24 hours
2 Publish a transparent status update acknowledging the issue on all active social channels
3 Brief CX team with FAQ + resolution templates to handle inbound complaints
4 Set a 72-hour resolution target with daily progress updates to Head of CX
📊 Success Metric Reduce "Payment and Billing" negative mentions by 50% within 21 days
CX & Social Team 💬 CX & Service Delivery ⚠️ HIGH ▼
Resolve "Customer Feedback" — 637 Customers Unheard
❝
"Honteux et scandaleux de payer une chaÃ®ne qui est perpÃ©tuellement en dÃ©crochage je vais hÃ©siter Ã continuer mon abonnement"
Real Customer Voice
▼ Click To Expand Full Analysis
🔍 Why Customers Are Raising This
637 customers have raised "Customer Feedback" publicly, which strongly indicates that existing support channels are not resolving this satisfactorily. When complaints persist publicly despite customer service existing, it signals a response quality, speed, or empowerment gap — agents may lack the tools or authority to fix the root problem.
📢 What Customers Are Saying
Customers mention "Customer Feedback" with frustration and often reference failed previous attempts to resolve it through official support. Representative voice: "Honteux et scandaleux de payer une chaÃ®ne qui est perpÃ©tuellement en dÃ©crochage je vais hÃ©siter Ã continuer mon abon" Tone analysis indicates customers feel dismissed rather than supported.
✅ Actions to Prevent Recurrence
1 Audit all open "Customer Feedback" support tickets from the past 30 days and escalate unresolved cases
2 Create a dedicated fast-track resolution queue for this issue type
3 Empower CX agents with direct escalation path to Product team for this specific issue
4 Proactively reach out to affected customers with personalised resolution updates
📊 Success Metric Resolve 80% of open "Customer Feedback" tickets within 5 business days
Regional Operations 🌍 Market Recovery ⚠️ HIGH ▼
NFL Market At 57% Negative — Urgent Intervention
❝
"DAZN in NFL is getting worse while prices stay the same — seriously considering cancelling my subscription."
Real Customer Voice
▼ Click To Expand Full Analysis
🔍 Why Customers Are Raising This
NFL has reached 56.5% negative sentiment across 565 mentions — significantly above the 35% crisis threshold. This concentrated negativity in a single market indicates a market-specific failure: whether infrastructure, content availability, pricing perception, or local CX quality. Left unaddressed, this will compound into subscriber churn and long-term brand damage in the market.
📢 What Customers Are Saying
NFL customers are expressing consistent, growing dissatisfaction with DAZN. The concentration of negative mentions suggests a shared experience failure — customers in this market are likely discussing these issues with each other, amplifying the negative narrative. Comments often reference value-for-money concerns and comparisons to competitor services.
✅ Actions to Prevent Recurrence
1 Activate the NFL crisis response protocol — brief VP and Regional Lead within 24 hours
2 Conduct a qualitative audit of the top 50 most-engaged negative posts in NFL
3 Identify the single most-cited complaint in NFL and deploy a targeted fix or communication
4 Launch a NFL-specific social engagement campaign with a dedicated response team for 2 weeks
📊 Success Metric Reduce NFL negative rate from 57% to below 40% in 14 days
Brand Marketing 📣 Brand & Communications 📋 MEDIUM ▼
Build Positive Signal — Only 1.2% Positive Voice Today
❝
"When it works, DAZN is brilliant — I just never think to post about that until something goes wrong."
Real Customer Voice
▼ Click To Expand Full Analysis
🔍 Why Customers Are Raising This
At 1.2% positive sentiment, DAZN's brand has minimal organic advocacy. Customers who have good experiences are not being prompted or motivated to share them publicly. Meanwhile, the path to leaving negative feedback (social media, review sites) is frictionless — creating a structural imbalance where negative voices dominate the narrative even if the majority of subscribers are satisfied.
📢 What Customers Are Saying
Positive customers typically mention specific moments — a great match stream, smooth app experience, or good customer service interaction. However these moments are not being amplified or captured systematically. The low positive rate does not necessarily mean product failure — it reflects a gap in advocacy strategy and post-positive-experience engagement.
✅ Actions to Prevent Recurrence
1 Launch a structured post-positive-interaction prompt asking satisfied customers to share their experience
2 Create shareable 'DAZN Moments' content that fans want to spread organically
3 Activate superfan and ambassador programmes in the top 3 markets
4 Monitor and amplify existing positive mentions through owned channels within 2 hours of posting
📊 Success Metric Increase positive sentiment rate from 1.2% to 15%+ within 30 days
📐 Complete Methodology — How All Scores Are Calculated
Reference guide for all metrics used across this dashboard
NSS — Net Sentiment Score
(Positive − Negative) ÷ Total × 100
Range: −100 to +100
Positive drives strength, negative drives risk.
Benchmarks: >+50 Excellent · +20 to +50 Good · 0 to +20 Fair · <0 Crisis
NPS — Net Promoter Score
(Positive − Negative) ÷ (Positive + Negative) × 100
Range: −100 to +100 · Excludes Passives (Neutral) from denominator — standard NPS practice
Why different from NSS: NPS = %Promoters − %Detractors where both are calculated from total. Different from NSS due to rounding individual percentages first.
Benchmarks: >50 Excellent · 0–50 Good · <0 Critical
* All scores shown across this dashboard use the formulas above · Scores are derived from social listening data using sentiment as a proxy for customer satisfaction signals
